prestazioni: Mountune MP275 Upgrade for the EcoBoost 1.6L (Fox) engine (Ford part #1770015), featuring a high-flow air intake, uprated intercooler (Garrett 60mm core), and a bespoke ECU calibration pushing 275 HP and 310 Nm torque with 98 RON fuel, paired with a Milltek Sport 3-inch cat-back exhaust (resonated, non-valved) to optimize turbo spool and mid-range torque without drone

AP Racing CP9662-1000 front brake kit (330mm 2-piece rotors, 4-piston calipers) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and Goodridge 6AN braided stainless steel brake lines, complemented by a rear brake bias adjustment kit (Wilwood proportioning valve) for track-focused balance

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (part #19-05-001) with 8-position adjustable compression/rebound damping, 20mm adjustable ride height, and spherical top mounts (polyurethane bushings replaced with SuperPro 694R), paired with Eibach anti-roll bars (24mm front, 19mm rear) and Whiteline adjustable end links (part #KCA416) for precise roll stiffness tuning
estetica: Rieger Tuning MK8 Fiesta ST widebody kit (fiberglass, 30mm extended front fenders, 40mm rear, with integrated carbon fiber side skirts and front splitter), finished in BASF R-M Concept P190-6 'Liquid Silver' with a 3-stage matte clear coat for UV resistance

Recaro Sportster CS II seats (part #24-75-54) in black Alcantara with red contrast stitching (Sparco thread #01107), paired with Schroth Profi II 4-point harnesses (part #103401) and a custom FIA-spec bolt-in roll cage (Custom Cages 6-point, T45 steel, powder-coated Ford Performance Blue)

Hella Rallye 3000 Compact LED spotlights (part #007756251) mounted on a custom aluminum roof rack (Thule 716, modified with CNC-machined aluminum uprights) and a carbon fiber rear diffuser (Seibon CF-PN-FIE16-01) with integrated twin 80mm exhaust outlets (custom titanium tips by Burns Stainless)
